transcript: Let's see if we can do something with the refinement model. Like uh Gemma is using way too much um latency right now.

I want to make sure we remember that recordings can be much longer than one sentence. A real user might talk for two or three minutes and explain a whole idea. In that case the model should not compress everything into one clever sentence. It should still keep the same vocabulary and the same sequence of thoughts, while cleaning up fillers and repeated words.
